home.name: Asror Qobulov
home.tagline: I craft modern, performant, and accessible web applications that users love.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Know me better
about.heading: Full-Stack Web Developer based in Samarkand
about.p1: I'm a passionate developer specializing in modern web technologies. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.
about.p2: With strong fundamentals in JavaScript, React, and Node.js, I build end-to-end applications — from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable backend services and databases.

web_dev.title: Web Development
web_dev.desc: Building fast, responsive websites and progressive web apps using modern tooling.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.desc: Pixel-perfect interfaces that look stunning on every device, from phones to widescreens.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Apps
fullstack.desc: End-to-end solutions: REST/GraphQL APIs, databases, auth, real-time, and deployment.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Cross-platform mobile applications built with React Native for iOS and Android.

freelance.title: Freelance Web Developer
freelance.desc: Building custom websites and web applications for clients across various industries.

internship.title: Frontend Developer Intern
internship.desc: Developed responsive UIs in React, collaborated with designers and backend engineers.

software engineer.title: Software Engineer
software engineer.desc: Developing full-stack web applications, creating RESTful APIs, and managing databases.

university.title: Software Engineering
university.desc: Bachelor's degree in software engineering — algorithms, data structures, databases, and software architecture.

academy.title: Frontend Development

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.p: Have a project in mind? Looking for a collaborator? Or just want to say hi? Drop me a line — I'll respond within 24 hours.
